title: 6 Things to Know about AIE World's Fair 2026
summary: The AI Engineer channel announces AIE World's Fair 2026 in San Francisco, highlighting expanded content, expo floor experiences, research-industry synergy, leadership tracks, and vertical-specific sessions. The event features $40k in sponsor offers and limited early-bird ticket availability.
writeup: The AI Engineer channel announces AIE World's Fair 2026 in San Francisco, walking through six points about the event. Coverage includes expanded content, expo floor experiences, research-industry synergy, leadership tracks, and vertical-specific sessions. The video also notes $40k in sponsor offers and limited early-bird ticket availability.
